word: G1020 - βραδυπλοέω - bradyploéō - brad-oo-plo-eh'-o - Sail slowly

sections.paragraph:
- Original: βραδυπλοέω

- Transliteration: Braduploeo

- Phonetic: brad-oo-plo-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to sail slowly

- Origin: from G1021 and a prolonged form of G4126

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1021 and a prolonged form of G4126; to sail slowly: - sail slowly.
